posts.text:
ABC, Meta, X, and Paramount promised as much as $63 million in donations to Trump's future Presidential Library.

But now the Library Fund is dissolved, leaving the American people in the dark on the fate of millions of dollars.

Where did that money go? I’m pushing for answers.

Republicans in Congress seem to think that ICE should be allowed to mask up, teargas kids, drag people out of their cars, throw people to the ground, and shoot people in broad daylight without any real accountability.

We must stop ICE’s violence.

American taxpayers have paid over $11 billion in the first week for Trump’s illegal war in Iran.

Meanwhile, the Trump administration cut $10 billion for social services, child care and aid for five Democratic-led states.

Our most vulnerable children are paying the price of Trump’s illegal war.

The Trump administration wants $50 billion to fund the illegal war in Iran. I’m a hard NO.

With that money, Congress could fund the Affordable Care Act’s health care tax credits this year and still have $20 billion left over.

Under Trump, antitrust enforcement has become a cesspool of corruption.

The Trump administration’s decision to give Live Nation a light slap on the wrist is a betrayal of every music lover and concertgoer exploited by Live Nation-Ticketmaster.
nbcnews.com/politics/congres…
This bipartisan bill is a major step forward in building more housing all across America—and ensuring those homes are owned by families, not Wall Street investors.

All three of my brothers served in the military. It’s hard to describe the pain of shipping a generation off to war.

The Trump administration is not taking the lives of our sons and daughters and grandkids seriously.

reuters.com/world/middle-eas…

The unemployment rate rose to 4.4% in February. Young workers and workers of color are being hit hardest.

Nearly 2 million Americans have been out of work for over six months.

Meanwhile, Trump is pouring millions of dollars into renovating his gold-encrusted ballroom.

Instead of helping Americans drowning in student loan debt, Trump is making life worse for borrowers—including potentially selling the federal student loan portfolio.

If the Trump administration cared about working-class families, it wouldn’t sell them out to Wall Street.

Trump has stolen over $1,700 from each American family through his illegal tariffs.

Not returning the money would be theft in broad daylight from each and every American family that has paid the price of Trump’s chaotic tariffs.

What is Trump’s justification for attacking Iran?

What’s his plan to get out?

What constitutes “winning” here?

Is this another Forever War?

The American people deserve real answers, not contradictions or lies.

American taxpayers spend nearly $1 billion every day funding Trump’s illegal war in Iran.

Meanwhile, the Republicans in Congress claim we can’t afford to fund education, child care, housing, or health care.

American households are struggling to afford groceries, housing, health care, child care, and electricity.

And now the price of gas is increasing because of Trump’s war in Iran.

Trump has broken his promises, and working Americans are paying the price.

nytimes.com/2026/03/10/us/ga…
they're scared that we would be just as if not more badass
had to read this for my high school english exams almost 20 years ago. still my favourite book all these years later. It really made you put yourself in the shoes of others
Dear Santa for Xmas I would like....... 😍😍😍
They want to kill us. We have to resist
Probably not I fully expect to be shot in the street when Trump declares a trans genocide
Elon shitting his panties rn ong
people, please.... I am not Elizabeth warren the senator. why would she have the amazing Shia LaBeouf as her pfp? I was however, named after her by my mother 🥰
this is my actual name you fucking nazi
Honestly, at this point, we should just replace moderators with a mic and a timer. Let’s see who can roast their opponent into submission before they even get to their argument. 🥴

as Democrats we must resist the temptation of digital distractions on X (or whatever it’s calling itself today) 📱. Our time is best spent uniting against the tide of fascism 🦸‍♂️✊, not squabbling over algorithms. Let’s stay grounded, organized, and relentlessly committed to a better future #StayFocused
haha you would think that but its actually an honor 🥰

Trump & Musk’s X are a threat to democracy & trans safety. 🚨 Musk’s free speech absolutism fuels hate, making transphobia mainstream. 🧨 We can't let platforms amplify lies & harm. It's time to fight for a future where everyone is safe & heard. 🌈✊  #DefendDemocracy  #TransLivesMatter #MuskIsDangerous
What is going on with Warner Brothers? I'm here to explain.
Hate Ticketmaster?
Donald Trump can't spare the money for millions of Americans to get health care, but he'll spend a billion dollars a day bombing Iran.
No war with Iran.
Who is Donald Trump’s America “golden” for?
Who would win the tax dodging Olympics?
Filing your taxes should be easy and FREE.
Why is Trump suing his own IRS?!
Donald Trump gave Amazon HOW MUCH money?!
Did I forget anything?
